title: Griff (disambiguation)
content:
'''Griff''' or '''Grif''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Griff Halloran]]''', a [[pilot]] who was a member of the [[Ace Squadron]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Crix Griff]]''', a con man who lived on Elrood
*'''[[Grif Grawley]]''', a farmer who assisted [[Kyle Katarn]] in the quest for the [[Valley of the Jedi]].
*'''[[Grif]]''', an [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer.
*'''[[Griff (New Republic)]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] soldier who participated in the [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel]].
*'''[[Amise Griff]]''', Imperial admiral who developed the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].
*'''[[Griff Praji]]''', brother of [[Tannon Praji/Legends|Tannon Praji]] and father of [[Nahdonnis Praji]].
*'''[[Griff Takel]]''', Imperial governor of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]].
*'''[[Griff Vao]]''', failed [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businessman and brother of [[Mission Vao]].
*'''[[griff (creature)]]''', a creature from [[Abonshee]]
*'''Gryph''', a nickname for '''[[Marn Hierogryph]]''', a [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] scoundrel first pursued and later accompanied by [[Zayne Carrick]]

{{Disambig}}
